attr.title: Kudamono Merge
attr.desc: Kudamono Merge is a retro-style puzzle game made with Pyxel. Drop and merge identical fruits to evolve them into bigger ones. Keep stacking and aim for a high score! Inspired by Suika Game, but with a classic 8-bit twist.
attr.inst: Download the game  at https://takeshic.itch.io/kudamono-merge, and place the KudamonoMerge.pyxapp file in the kudamonomerge/gamedata folder.
attr.inst_md: Download the game  at [https://takeshic.itch.io/kudamono-merge](https://takeshic.itch.io/kudamono-merge), and place the **KudamonoMerge.pyxapp** file in the kudamonomerge/gamedata folder.
